title: RCBO Price in Pakistan 2026 — Residual Current Circuit Breaker with Overcurrent Protection Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: Complete RCBO price guide for Pakistan 2026. Type AC RCBO (B-curve 30mA) from Rs. 850–Rs. 3,200 per piece. Type A RCBO (solar/VFD/EV circuits) from Rs. 2,200–Rs. 6,500. 2-Pole generator RCBO from Rs. 1,400–Rs. 4,800. Includes RCBO vs MCB+RCCB comparison, Type A vs Type AC selection for Pakistan solar and EV charger circuits, B-curve vs C-curve guide, Pakistan DB space calculation, bathroom circuit compliance, and EV charger RCBO specification. Prices for Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad markets — July 2026.
